infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: OpenClaw uses your camera to send photos to the AI agent via node capabilities.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: OpenClaw uses your location to respond to gateway location requests.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: OpenClaw uses your location to respond to gateway location requests.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: OpenClaw uses speech recognition for voice input to the AI agent.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow OpenClaw to access your camera for node capabilities.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow OpenClaw to access your location for node capabilities.
